sql_array: CREATE TABLE string_test (id UInt32, haystack String, needle String);
INSERT INTO string_test VALUES (1, 'Hello World', 'World Hello');
SELECT ngramSearch(haystack, needle) AS similarity_score FROM string_test WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE string_test SET needle = 'Hello' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT ngramSearch(haystack, needle) FROM string_test WHERE haystack LIKE '%Hello%';
